zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Gurdon於1322年出生在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆時，她的父親Jon Gurdon37歲，母親Anne Coleman28歲。她和Roger Wyncoll至少有1個兒子。她去世於1373年在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Gurdon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Gurdon was born in 1322, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Jon Gurdon, was 37 and her mother, Anne Coleman, was 28. She had at least 1 son with Roger Wyncoll. She died in 1373, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Roger Wyncoll. Elle est décédée en 1373, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Gurdonが1322年にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムで生まれた時，父Jon Gurdonは37歳，母Anne Colemanは28歳であった。彼女はRoger Wyncollとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1373年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Gurdon(이)가 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jon Gurdon(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Coleman(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Roger Wyncoll(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Gurdon родилась в 1322 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Jon Gurdon было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Coleman, 28. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Roger Wyncoll. Она умерла в 1373 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
